name: Shoulder to Shoulder (Left Side and Right Side) Development
preceding_figure_names: Side Step To Left commenced with LF, Time Step LF, Closed Basic Movement, Open Basic Movement, Spot or Switch Turn To R (Lady to L), Underarm Turn To L, Hand To Hand RSP
following_figure_names: Closed Basic Movement, Open Basic Movement, Spot or Switch Turn To L (Lady to R), Underarm Turn To R, Hand To Hand LSP, Side Step To Left commenced with RF, Time Step RF, Fan, Closed Hip Twist, Alemana, Cuban Break RF, Split Cuban Break RF, New York RSP, Three Cha Cha Chas Forward
notes: Lady is always stepping diagonally back. When foot is stepped cross the line, it's strong CBMP. CBM: take shoulder of free leg to standing leg. Focus on transferring spine, proper leg actions.

steps.action: Step forward to Lady's left side
comments: Body has no turns, facing partner. Only lower body turns to step Outside Partner.

steps.action: Chasse to side (LRL) ending slightly forward
comments: Ending LF side and slightly forward

steps.action: Step forward towards Lady's right side

comments: Foot position in CBMP. Strong CBMP when foot crosses line.
CBM: take shoulder of free leg to standing leg.

steps.action: Transfer weight to left foot towards man's side
comments: Transfer weight to LF towards partner's side

steps.action: Chasse to side (RLR) ending slightly back
comments: Focus on transferring spine, proper leg actions
